title: eurya pittosporifolia
intro: Eurya pittosporifolia, also known as the Southeast Asian or Thai eurya, is a species of flowering plant in the family Euryaceae, native to Southeast Asia. This plant is used in traditional medicine, with its medicinal properties attributed to the presence of triterpenoid saponins and flavonoids. The health benefits of Eurya pittosporifolia include its ability to lower blood pressure, reduce inflammation, and exhibit antimicrobial activity, making it a potential treatment for various health conditions. Eurya pittosporifolia can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are often used in traditional medicine to leverage its medicinal properties.
